---
title: "Algorithms"
description: "Core signal processing and ML/DL building blocks with full mathematical derivations."
listing:
  contents:
    - fourier.qmd
    - moving_average.qmd
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, date]
---

Each article here presents a standalone algorithm used in our trading system.
The structure is always the same: **motivation → math → code → performance**.

::: {.callout-tip}
All code blocks are executable. You can run the full notebook by cloning the repo
and following the [Quick Start](../quickstart/index.qmd).
:::
